prompts.text: Professional food photography of authentic Korean Doenjang Jjigae soybean paste stew bubbling hot inside a traditional black earthenware Ttukbaegi pot, garnished with fresh green scallions and red chili peppers, high-angle studio shot, soft shadows, condensation droplets, ultra-sharp detail, isolated on a clean white background.
